DescribeMetricData.resourceType: Cloud product resource type, e.g. Instance. Not used as a query condition; only used to verify that filters contain all identifier attributes required by the resourceType
DescribeMetricData.filters: List of dimension filter conditions; must include all Resource.Identifiers dimensions for the resource type
DescribeMetricData.filters.values: Multiple values, applicable to operator: in
DescribeMetricData.limit: Maximum number of curves returned when multiple curves match; default: 10, max: 100
DescribeMetricData.periodSeconds: Aggregation period in seconds; default: auto-determined based on query time range
DescribeMetricData.aggregationOverTime: Time-axis aggregation method; default: ["avg"], options: avg / sum / max / min / count
